sections.paragraph:
an unused root; Arabic لَأَكَ Conj. IV. Ethiopic ለአከ፡ to depute, to send a messenger; ተልእከ፡ (to be sent) to wait upon, to minister; ለእክ፡ minister, servant. (Kindred roots are הָלַךְ, יָלַךְ and Lat. legavit.)

Derivatives, מַלְאָךְ, [מַלְאָךְ], מְלָאכָה, מְלֶאכֶת, [מַלְאָכוּת, pr.n. מַלְאָכִי].
